sub_modules.fp_mult_unpack: Combinational IEEE-754 operand unpacking, sign generation, significand construction, and special-case classification.
sub_modules.fp_mult_exp_mul: Combinational effective exponent calculation and 24x24 significand multiplication.
sub_modules.fp_mult_normalize: Combinational product normalization with guard, round, and sticky bit extraction.
sub_modules.fp_mult_round_rne: Combinational round-to-nearest-even mantissa rounding with exponent carry adjustment.
sub_modules.fp_mult_pack_special: Combinational IEEE-754 result packing with NaN, infinity, zero, overflow, normal, and underflow priority handling.
